title: Fix Group By Feature Throwing Errors on Selection
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Group By feature to work without errors when selecting a grouping option, so that I can browse reports by category.
description: Bug fix: selecting a group option in the Reports and Dashboards Group By dropdown was throwing JavaScript errors, preventing the grouping feature from functioning.
acceptance_criteria: Selecting a group option does not throw errors
Grouped view displays correctly after selection
ux_changes: Fixed the Group By dropdown to properly apply grouping without JavaScript errors.
implementation_notes: Error in the grouping logic was likely introduced during recent UX refactoring of the Group By feature.
comment_summary: Balaji resolved the grouping display error.
